sourceMovie.title: Good Fortune
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Good Fortune (2025) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Aziz Ansari's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Dogma
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Fortune clicked for you, Dogma (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good Fortune?
faq.answer: Try Dogma, Ruby Sparks, A Matter of Life and Death—each shares DNA with Good Fortune while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good Fortune?
faq.answer: Good Fortune (2025) is best described as Comedy, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good Fortune worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
